tools.name: get_episode
tools.description: Get one episode and its chapter metadata by slug.

tools.name: get_transcript_segment
tools.description: Get transcript turns overlapping an optional window of at most five minutes, with exact timestamps. Defaults to 00:00–03:00 so the first call stays within the response limit.

tools.name: list_episode_clips
tools.description: List clips for an episode, including citations, media details, and publication state.

tools.name: get_clip
tools.description: Get one clip by ID with its URL, transcript, media, and publication details.

tools.name: get_reading_trail
tools.description: Get an episode reading trail with citations and cursor pagination.

tools.name: get_flashcards
tools.description: Get reviewed, evidence-linked episode flashcards with bounded cursor pagination. No scoring or engagement coercion.
